emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Fallback message: gather contact info and advise them we'll have someone there within two hours; if it's a food safety issue, call the health department if needed

call_transfer_rules.transfer_announcement: Please hold while I connect you to our service team

integration_constraints: Never create jobs for residential; strictly commercial
never create a preventive maintenance job without first confirming the contract number — the
never create a service job for a site not already in our ServiceTrade customer list
ServiceTrade constraints — no residential, PM jobs need contract number
after_hours_flow_summary: After hours, the agent confirms whether the issue is an emergency. Emergency calls are immediately routed to on-call staff. Non-emergency calls receive a message-taking flow with a next-business-day callback promise.
office_hours_flow_summary: During business hours (Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday 07:00–17:00 Chicago), calls are answered and routed to the main office or scheduling desk. If transfer fails, a message is taken and callback is promised.
